title: Adding a value to an item name
excerpt:
I’m looking for a way to add a value from a drop-down column to the item name. 
For example, once i choose one of the values from the drop down menu, then this value will be added to the beginning of the item name.

posts.author: Itayett (Ettinger)
posts.cookedHtml:
